basic_details.job_title: CARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Senior Research Fellow & Yoga Therapist Posts

age_limit.details: Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS is as per Govt. of India rules. Yoga Therapist: No specific age limit mentioned in the provided data. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS is as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-Graduation in Chemistry/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Plant Sciences for SRF; Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and 2 years experience OR Graduate with Diploma in Yoga and 5 years experience for Yoga Therapist.
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry): Post-Graduation in Chemistry / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Plant Sciences from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Knowledge of ASU drug standardization, phytochemistry, analytical techniques such as handling of instruments like HPTLC/HPLC/GC/LC-MS, etc. Drafting of scientific documents/articles/reports, etc., Working knowledge of computer applications. Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognised University and two years experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/Hospital. OR Any Graduate from a recognised University established under UGC Act with Diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least one-year duration from a recognised University/Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices. Desirable: Working experience in traditional Yoga Therapy from an institute of national repute/Hospital. Working knowledge of Computer Operation. Working knowledge of Hindi, English and Sanskrit languages. Working experience in research projects related to Yoga Therapy/case studies etc. Fluency in English.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 42,000/- + 30% HRA for SRF; Rs. 38,000/- consolidated for Yoga Therapist.
salary_details.details: Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry): Rs. 42,000/- Plus 30% HRA per month Yoga Therapist: Rs. 38,000/- per month (Consolidated)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the CARI Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 29th June 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts announced by CARI?
faq.answer: Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) has announced vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) and Yoga Therapist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry)?
faq.answer: For the Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) post, candidates need a Post-Graduation in Chemistry / Biochemistry / Biotechnology / Plant Sciences from a recognized University/Institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: For the Yoga Therapist post, candidates require a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and 2 years experience, OR a Graduate with a Diploma in Yoga and 5 years experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow (Chemistry) post is Rs. 42,000/- Plus 30% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Yoga Therapist post is Rs. 38,000/- per month (Consolidated).

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to attend a Walk-in Interview. They should bring their duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of certificates and original documents.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) office in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with pincode 560109.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their duly filled application, a set of self-attested photocopies of certificates, mark sheets, caste certificate, experience certificates, and two recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for CARI Recruitment 2026?
